meta.title: Agar.io v2.0
meta.description: miirtvit tkvenze patara ujredebi da nu shechamt ufro didebs, rogorts MMO

settings.keyRebindHint: daatskapunet ghilaks da daachiret ghilaks khelakhla dasakavshireblad
settings.mouseHint: daakonfiguriret ra mokmedebas asrulebs mausis titoeuli ghilaki

connecting.firewall: tu serverebtan dakavshireba ver kherkhdeba, sheamotsmet, gakvt tu ara raime antivirusi an bukhari, romelits blokavs kavshirs.
connecting.multisessionBody:
tamashis mravali magaliti daushvebelia.
dakhuret qvela skhva tamashis magaliti da gadatvirtet.
connecting.oldBrowserLink: gtkhovt, daatskapunot ak, rata ganaakhlot tkveni brauzeri ufro akhal versiaze.
connecting.bannedBody: tkven akrdzaluli khart tamashshi, radgan daarghviet tsesebi an chatis spamis gamokveqnebisas, an morgebuli skinebis atvirtvisas.
connecting.bannedBodyBots: თქვენ აკრძალული ხართ თამაშში, რადგან დაარღვიეთ წესები ბოტების ან მორგებული სკრიპტების გამოყენებით.

errors.browserUnsupported: tkvens brauzers ar akvs sachiro funktsiebis mkhardachera, gtkhovt, ganaakhlot tkveni brauzeri.
errors.nicknameDisallowed: es metsakheli daushvebelia. gtkhovt, airchiot skhva metsakheli.

gameplay.rule1: ar atvirtot akrdzaluli morgebuli skinebi, mit umetes, tu es vighatsis sakhea, shesadzloa tkveni kani aikrdzalos an tavad aikrdzalos tamashi.
gameplay.rule2: nu gamoiqenebt skhva adamianebis metsakhelebs chatshi an tkveni sakhelis damamtsireblad, sheidzleba dadumdet an tamashshi akrdzalot.
gameplay.controlsIntro:
gadaaadgilet tkveni mausi / TOUCH, rata martot tkveni ujredi
mausis borbali an F da V-ze.
W an martskhniv datskapunebit masis amosaghebaddaachiret
SPACE tkveni ujredis ertkhel gasaqofaddaachiret
daatskapunet marjvena ghilakitdaachiret C an
shua datskapuneba mravaljeradi gaqofis gasaketeblad
gameplay.objective: mizani: Agar.io-s mizania gaizardos tkveni ujredi patara ujredebis mokhmarebit da ufro didi ujredebis tavidan atsilebit. rotsa izrdebi, ufro dzlieri gakhdebi da shedzleb kidev ufro didi ujredebis mokhmarebas.
gameplay.startingOut: datsqeba: rodesats pirvelad sheuertdebit tamashs, daitsqebt rogorts patara ujredi. imodzravet mausis gamoqenebit rukaze mimofantuli feradi martsvlebis shesagroveblad. martsvlebis chama zrdis tkvens zomas da masas.
gameplay.movement: modzraoba: tkveni ujredis gadasatanad, tkven ubralod gadaitanet mausis kursori an gamoiqenet tkveni sensoruli ekrani im mimartulebit gadaadgilebit, sadats gsurt tkveni ujredi tsavides. tkveni ujredi mihqveba mausis kursoris modzraobas ekranze.
gameplay.consumeSmaller: moikhmaret patara ujredebi: tvali adevnet akhlomakhlo roumingis patara ujredebs. rats ufro didi gakhdebit, tkven shedzlebt am patara ujredebis gadaqlapvas tkveni masis gasazrdelad. miuakhlovdit mat strategiulad, rata ar shechamon ufro didi ujredebi.
gameplay.avoidLarger: moeridet ufro did ujredebs: frtkhilad iqavit ufro didi ujredebis mimart, radgan mat sheudzliat mogchamon, tu matze patara khar. gaufrtkhildit motamasheebs, romlebits iqofa patara ujredebis dasacherad da sheetsadet tsinastsar gansazghvrot mati modzraobebi, rata daitsvan usafrtkhod.
gameplay.splitting: gaqofa: shegidzliat daqot tkveni ujredi ramdenime patara natsilad SPACE dacherit. gamoiqenet es taktika patara ujredebis dasacherad an ufro didi ujredebisgan tavis dasaghtsevad. tkven aseve shegidzliat gaaketot ramdenime gaqofa X an Z dacherit. daimakhsovre, gaqofa ufro dautsvels gkhdis, amitom gonivrulad gamoiqene.
gameplay.ejectingMass: masis amogheba: rodesats masis amogheba W an martskhniv datskapunebit dacherit sheidzleba momgebiani iqos, mas aseve akvs riskebi. amogdebuli masa sheidzleba mokhmardes skhva motamasheebs, mat shoris potentsiur konkurentebs. garda amisa, masis gamodevna amtsirebs tkveni ujredis saerto zomas, ramats sheidzleba gakhados ufro dautsveli ufro didi ujre���ebis mier mokhmarebis mimart.
gameplay.teamPlay: gunduri tamashi (arasavaldebulo): gundur rezhimshi, shegidzliat itanamshromlot skhva motamasheebtan liderbordis dominirebistvis. gaertiandit megobrebtan an skhva motamasheebtan, rata ajobot oponentebs da ertad daipqrot tamashi.
gameplay.growDominate: izrdet da dominirdet: rogorts tkven moikhmart patara ujredebs da tavs aridebt chamas, tkveni ujredi gaagrdzelebs zomit zrdas. sheetsadet gakhdet qvelaze didi ujredi serverze da dominirdet liderbortze.
gameplay.viruses: ufrtkhildit virusebs: rukaze, tkven shekhvdebit mtsvane tsvetian tsreebs, romlebits tsnobilia rogorts virusebi. moeridet mattan shejakhebas, radgan mat sheudzliat tkveni ujredis daqofa patara nachrebad, tu tkven matze didi khart. virusebis tkveni masis mimartulebidan gamokveba gamoitsvevs mat sapirispiro mimartulebit gamravlebas.
gameplay.beStrategic: iqavi strategiuli: Agar.io iseve ekheba strategias, rogorts unars. quradgheba miaktsiet tkvens garemotsvas, moitminet tkveni motsinaaghmdegis svlebi da gamoiqenet iseti taktika, rogoritsaa gaqofa da gaertianeba gonivrulad, rata ajobot konkurentebs.
gameplay.closing: es aris Agar.io-s safudzvlebistvis! akhla droa gadakhvidet tamashshi da daitsqot tkveni ujredis gazrda, rata gakhdet qvelaze didi da dominanturi motamashe serverze.

items: gaumjobesebuli ujredebis sakhelebi, ujredis masa da Cell Jelly Physics renderis shesruleba, rodesats isini chartulia parametrebshi
damatebulia ufro neli masobrivi ganakhlebebi parametrebshi slaiderit, rata akontrolot ra sikhshirit ganakhldeba ritskhvebi (slaideris marjvniv gadatseva nishnavs dabal ganakhlebebs)
metsakhelebi akhla unda iqos minimum 3 simbolo
damatebulia arasavaldebulo Words Censorship Chat da Nicknames-istvis, is chartulia naguliskhmevad, shegidzliat gamortot, magram shemdeg ar ichivlot utankhmoeba adamianebis toksikurobis shesakheb
dafiksirda maqureblis tavisufali kameris gadartva, akhla tkven shegidzliat stsorad gadartot motamasheebis avtomaturi tvalquris devneba ufaso kameraze maqureblis rezhimshi
metsakhelebi akhla autsilebelia tkven aghar shegidzliat tsarieli metsakhelebi gkondet
dadumebuli motamashis gaumjobesebuli funktsia akhla dadumeba sheetsdeba ganaskhvavos motamasheebs igive zedmetsakhelit da sheetsdeba dadumeba mkholod is, vints gsurdat
damatebulia gadidebis da gadidebis mobiluri ghilakebi, shegidzliat gadartot zum slaideris chveneba chveneba an damalva parametrebshi
mobiluri ghilakebis pozitsiis gaumjobesebuli morgeba, akhla shegidzliat sheekhet 3 tsamis ganmavlobashi nebismier ghilakze mis gadasaadgileblad
damatebulia mobiluri ghilakebis pozitsiebis gadaqeneba parametrebshi tu gsurt mobiluri ghilakebis gadaqeneba naguliskhmev pozitsiebze
damatebulia mobilis chaketvis ghilakebi parametrebshi, tu amas amotsmebt, ghilakebis gadaadgileba sheudzlebelia
tsashlilia shekhebis martvis ghilakebi parametrebidan (aghar aris sachiro, akhla shegidzliat gadaitanot ghilakebi sadats gindat)
damatebulia regulirebadi klaviaturis ghilakebi da mausis ghilakebi parametrebshi
damatebulia kameris gluvi da ujredis animatsiis sichkare parametrebshi
gaumjobesebulia Skins chatvirtvis metodi, rata gartuldes mati kopireba
gaumjobesebuli identikebi ise khshirad ar itsvleba

damatebulia motamashis dadumebis/dadumebis ghilaki, akhla shegidzliat dadumeba/dadumebis mokhsna konkretuli motamasheebis chatidan, mati shetqobinebis gverdit dadumebis/mokhsnis khatulaze dacherit an dadumebuli motamasheebis siis gamoqenebit
damatebulia chetis gadakhveva. akhla shegidzliat gadakhvidet gadakhvevis zolis gadaadgilebit mausi an ↑ isris zemot da ↓ isris kvemot gamoqenebit

damatebulia identikonebis chveneba mosanishni veli parametrebshi
tsashlilia khrikebi, romlebits sashualebas gadzlevt martivad gaaketot Nicks an Skins
daafiksira AZERTY klaviaturis rukebis shedgena akhla W da Z orive arkhi

akhla shegidzliat nakhot maqureblis metsakhelebi, tu mat akvt erti nakrebi
akhla tkven shegidzliat daaqenot virusebi tkveni ujredis masis virusebis amogdebit.

canvas.minionSpectator: თქვენ იყენებთ უფასო კამერის მაყურებლის ხედს, დააჭირეთ {key} უკან გადასართავად
